name: @sergeant/openclaw-plugin
description: Sergeant OpenClaw Gateway plugin (Phase 1 + Phase 4 + Phase 5). 24 read tools + 5 write tools (Variant B approval) + Layer 0/1 routers + audit lifecycle hooks + n8n Tier C gates + council round-table orchestration helpers.

read.name: recall_memory
read.description: Top-k semantic recall з founder cofounder-namespace memory.

read.name: n8n_describe
read.description: Опис workflow: nodes, triggers, tier, approvalRequired.

read.name: refresh_business_snapshot
read.description: Меta-tool: фаєрить усі Tier A workflows паралельно.

write.name: create_github_issue
write.description: Створює GitHub issue. Gated approval flow (variant B).

write.name: commit_to_strategy_doc
write.description: Комітить файл у strategy-docs repo. Gated approval flow (variant B).

write.name: post_to_topic
write.description: Постить повідомлення в Telegram topic. Gated approval flow (variant B).

write.name: pause_workflow
write.description: Призупиняє n8n workflow. Gated approval flow (variant B).

write.name: mute_alert
write.description: Мьютить Sentry issue alert. Gated approval flow (variant B).

write.name: n8n_trigger
write.description: Тригерить workflow. Tier A auto / Tier C approval-gated; Tier B+D refused server-side.

write.name: n8n_activate
write.description: Активує/деактивує workflow. Always approval-gated (Tier A/C only).

hooks.llm_input: Per-call budget gate (cap $0.5 USD; fail-closed на server-error) + Layer 0/1 routing.
hooks.agent_turn_start: Опен invocation-row у openclaw_invocations + correlator agent_run_id ↔ id.
hooks.agent_turn_end: Фіналізує invocation з cost rollup + final status.
hooks.tool_call_pre: [Variant B] Approval flow для 5 write-tools: send DM → waitForCallback → set state.
hooks.tool_call_post: Write-audit recording (Variant B executed/rejected) + n8n Tier C audit gate.

_notes: Phase 5 (PR-E): council round-table orchestration helpers — canonical COUNCIL_DEFAULT_SEQUENCE (Locked #8 — devops → eng → pm → growth → finance → cofounder) + createCouncilBudgetGate (fail-closed precondition vs $2.0 council cap). Actual sequential execution lives in the council-roundtable SKILL — runtime drives the persona loop.
Phase 4 (PR-D): 5 write tools з Variant B approval + n8n Tier C audit + write-audit integration через /write-audit/log.
Phase 1 (PR-C1a…C1d): 24 read tools + Layer 0/1 routing + 17 shortcuts + invocation lifecycle hooks.
